en: Fuck. You know what you did. Oh, my God.
ko: 젠장. 네가 뭘 했는지 알아. 오, 세상에.

en: Mm hmm. So the foodie revolution, it's really infiltrated the sports stadium.
ko: 음, 미식가 혁명이 스포츠 경기장에 침투했어.

en: What does it really feel like when one of those catfish feels a lot better in his fucking wings? You want to tell you that?
ko: 그런 메기 중 하나가 날개를 더 잘 느낄 때 기분이 어떤지 말해줄래?

en: Are you seriously trying to do this interview still?
ko: 진짜로 이 인터뷰를 계속 하려고 하는 거야?

en: Where does a guy like you feel more at home?
ko: 너 같은 사람은 어디서 더 편안함을 느껴? 아내와 함께 있을 때처럼, 어느 순간 포기하게 돼.

en: This is like with my wife. After a while, you just tap out. You're like, fine, buy it.
It's OK. It's OK. It was my contest.
Also, why did I sign up for this, man?
It is always amazing. Why am I doing this?
ko: 항상 놀라워. 왜 내가 이걸 하고 있지?

en: Why am I here? You were having a good morning. No, my life, my world.
ko: 왜 여기 있지? 좋은 아침이었는데. 아니, 내 인생, 내 세상.

en: What am I? You didn't need to fuck it up.
Fuck am I doing here? What's your name?
ko: 내가 여기서 뭘 하고 있는 거지? 네 이름은 뭐야?

en: It's time to reach for that jug. You lied to me.
ko: 그 항아리를 잡을 시간이다. 너 나한테 거짓말했어.
